# T-SQL Incompatibility Report

*This document is generated by the db-migration agent during Phase 1, Step 1.3.*

## Status: Pending

Run `/db-migrate samples/wide-world-importers` to generate this report.

| 18 | HIERARCHYID | *TBD* | | ltree extension |
| 19 | GEOGRAPHY / GEOMETRY | *TBD* | | PostGIS |
| 23 | Linked servers | *TBD* | | postgres_fdw |
